decision.overall_reasoning: This claim requires manual review due to multiple procedural issues: (1) Trip was not pre-approved per policy requirement, (2) Flight receipt missing for $480 expense which exceeds the $75 threshold requiring manager exception approval, (3) Dinner receipt missing for $42 (within $25-$75 range where declaration is acceptable). The emergency nature of the trip may justify policy exceptions but requires human judgment and documented after-the-fact approval.

expense_decisions.reason: Receipt missing for amount over $75; requires manager exception approval
Receipt missing; signed declaration needed for $25-$75 range

policy_references.content_snippet: All business travel must be pre-approved by the employee's direct manager
Missing receipts for expenses over $75 require manager exception approval

requires_additional_info: Written confirmation of after-the-fact manager approval
Flight receipt or manager exception approval for $480
Signed declaration for $42 dinner without receipt
